heading: Office to assist small manufacturers of medical devices; establishment
label: 3512 Office to assist small manufacturers of medical devices; establishment
text: The Secretary of Health and Human Services shall establish within the Department of Health and Human Services an identifiable office to provide technical and other nonfinancial assistance to small manufacturers of medical devices to assist them in complying with the requirements of the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act [ et seq.], as amended by this Act.21 U.S.C. 301
notes: References in TextFederal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act, referred to in text, is , , which is classified generally to chapter 9 (§ 301 et seq.) of Title 21, Food and Drugs.
